tools.name: codebase_question
tools.description: Retrieve repository facts, likely file locations, summaries of existing implementations, current contracts, and similar evidence-gathering context from the indexed codebase. After retrieval, inspect the relevant source files directly and do your own reasoning before deciding what to change. Returns a final answer segment plus conversationId and modelId for follow-ups.

question.description: Natural-language question to ask about the codebase.

conversationId.description: Optional conversation/thread id for follow-up turns.

provider.description: Optional chat provider to use; defaults to codex when omitted.

model.description: Optional model id for the selected provider. For codex, defaults to gpt-5.3-codex. For LM Studio, defaults to MCP_LMSTUDIO_MODEL or LMSTUDIO_DEFAULT_MODEL.

tools.name: reingest_repository
tools.description: Run a blocking re-embed for an already ingested repository root by sourceId and return a terminal summary payload.

sourceId.description: Repository selector for the ingested root. Supports repository id (case-insensitive), mounted container path, or host path; MCP canonicalizes to the normalized container path before execution.
